SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.store.jdbc.serializer

Class JsonSerializer

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.store.jdbc.serializer.JsonSerializer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializer
public class JsonSerializer extends Object implements Serializer
Jackson-backed Serializer that converts payloads to/from JSON using a provided ObjectMapper.

All methods are null-safe: a null input returns null without delegating to the underlying ObjectMapper.

Payload class allowlist

toClass(java.lang.String) loads a class from a name read back from the failover store. Because that value is persisted data, an allowlist restricts which classes may be loaded: a class name is accepted only if it exactly matches an entry or lives under an entry treated as a package prefix (entry "com.acme" accepts "com.acme.Country" and "com.acme.ref.Currency").

The allowlist is supplied lazily via a Supplier and resolved (and memoized) on first use — this lets the auto-configuration feed in the @Failover payload packages discovered by the startup scanner, which only completes after all singletons are built. An empty resolved allowlist preserves the historical allow-all behaviour.

Author:
Anand Manissery
See Also:
  • Serializer

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    JsonSerializer(tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper objectMapper)
    Creates a serializer with no payload class restriction (allow-all).
    JsonSerializer(tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper objectMapper, Supplier<List<String>> allowedPayloadClassesSupplier)
    Creates a serializer whose allowlist is resolved lazily on first use (allow-all on empty).
    JsonSerializer(tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper objectMapper, Supplier<List<String>> allowedPayloadClassesSupplier, boolean strict)
    Creates a serializer whose allowlist is resolved lazily on first use, with a configurable empty-allowlist behaviour.
    JsonSerializer(tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper objectMapper, List<String> allowedPayloadClasses)
    Creates a serializer that restricts toClass(java.lang.String) to the given fixed allowlist.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> @Nullable T
    deserialize(@Nullable String payload, Class<T> clazz)
    Deserializes payload back to an instance of clazz.
    <T> @Nullable String
    serialize(@Nullable T payload)
    Serializes payload to its string representation.
    <T> @Nullable Class<T>
    toClass(@Nullable String className)
    Resolves a Class from its fully-qualified name.
    <T> @Nullable String
    toClassName(@Nullable T payload)
    Returns the fully-qualified class name of payload's runtime type.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • JsonSerializer

      public JsonSerializer(tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper objectMapper)
      Creates a serializer with no payload class restriction (allow-all).
      Parameters:
      objectMapper - the Jackson mapper used for all conversions

    • JsonSerializer

      public JsonSerializer(tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper objectMapper, List<String> allowedPayloadClasses)
      Creates a serializer that restricts toClass(java.lang.String) to the given fixed allowlist.
      Parameters:
      objectMapper - the Jackson mapper used for all conversions
      allowedPayloadClasses - exact class names or package prefixes permitted for toClass(java.lang.String); an empty list disables the restriction

    • JsonSerializer

      public JsonSerializer(tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper objectMapper, Supplier<List<String>> allowedPayloadClassesSupplier)
      Creates a serializer whose allowlist is resolved lazily on first use (allow-all on empty).
      Parameters:
      objectMapper - the Jackson mapper used for all conversions
      allowedPayloadClassesSupplier - supplies the effective allowlist (exact class names or package prefixes); invoked once and memoized. An empty result disables the restriction

    • JsonSerializer

      public JsonSerializer(tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper objectMapper, Supplier<List<String>> allowedPayloadClassesSupplier, boolean strict)
      Creates a serializer whose allowlist is resolved lazily on first use, with a configurable empty-allowlist behaviour.
      Parameters:
      objectMapper - the Jackson mapper used for all conversions
      allowedPayloadClassesSupplier - supplies the effective allowlist (exact class names or package prefixes); invoked once and memoized
      strict - when true, an empty resolved allowlist denies all deserialization (fail-closed); when false, an empty allowlist disables the restriction (allow-all, legacy default)

  • Method Details

    • serialize

      public <T> @Nullable String serialize(@Nullable T payload)
      Serializes payload to its string representation.

      Delegates to ObjectMapper.writeValueAsString(java.lang.Object).

      Specified by:
      serialize in interface Serializer
      Type Parameters:
      T - the payload type
      Parameters:
      payload - the object to serialize; null is allowed
      Returns:
      the serialized string, or null if payload is null

    • deserialize

      public <T> @Nullable T deserialize(@Nullable String payload, Class<T> clazz)
      Deserializes payload back to an instance of clazz.

      Delegates to ObjectMapper.readValue(String, Class).

      Specified by:
      deserialize in interface Serializer
      Type Parameters:
      T - the target type
      Parameters:
      payload - the serialized string; null is allowed
      clazz - the target class; null is allowed
      Returns:
      the deserialized object, or null if either argument is null

    • toClassName

      public <T> @Nullable String toClassName(@Nullable T payload)
      Returns the fully-qualified class name of payload's runtime type.
      Specified by:
      toClassName in interface Serializer
      Type Parameters:
      T - the payload type
      Parameters:
      payload - the object whose class name is needed; null is allowed
      Returns:
      payload.getClass().getName(), or null if payload is null

    • toClass

      public <T> @Nullable Class<T> toClass(@Nullable String className)
      Resolves a Class from its fully-qualified name.
      Specified by:
      toClass in interface Serializer
      Type Parameters:
      T - the expected type
      Parameters:
      className - the fully-qualified class name; null is allowed
      Returns:
      the resolved Class, or null if className is null
      Throws:
      FailoverStoreException - if the class name is rejected by the configured allowlist, or if the class cannot be found on the classpath (e.g. the payload class was renamed or removed between deployments while rows referencing it remain in the store)
